mrtrix.synopsis: Check the orientation of the diffusion gradient table
description: Note that the corrected gradient table can be output using the -export_grad_{mrtrix,fsl} option.
mrtrix.author: Robert E. Smith (robert.smith@florey.edu.au)
citations: Jeurissen, B.; Leemans, A.; Sijbers, J. Automated correction of improperly rotated diffusion gradient orientations in diffusion weighted MRI. Medical Image Analysis, 2014, 18(7), 953-962

description:
Check the orientation of the diffusion gradient table.

Note that the corrected gradient table can be output using the -export_grad_{mrtrix,fsl} option.

References:

Jeurissen, B.; Leemans, A.; Sijbers, J. Automated correction of improperly rotated diffusion gradient orientations in diffusion weighted MRI. Medical Image Analysis, 2014, 18(7), 953-962
